data.en: The human body changes to adapt to a new way of life.
data.cn: 人体会改变以适应新的生活方式。
accept: The human body changes to adapt to a new way of life.

data.en: Humans are now ten centimetres taller than one hundred and fifty years ago.
data.cn: 人类现在比150年前高出10厘米。
accept: Humans are now ten centimetres taller than 150 years ago.

data.en: In the future, people will probably be even taller.
data.cn: 在未来，人们可能会更高。
accept: People will probably be even taller in the future.

data.en: Our muscles will not be as strong as now.
data.cn: 我们的肌肉不会像现在这样强壮。
accept: Our muscles will not be as strong as now.

data.en: We won't do a lot of physical work.
data.cn: 我们将不会做大量的体力活。
accept: We won't do a lot of physical work.

data.en: Our legs will get shorter and our feet smaller.
data.cn: 我们的腿会变短，脚会变小。
accept: Our legs will get shorter and our feet smaller.

data.en: Our fingers will get longer and our eyes better.
data.cn: 我们的手指会变长，眼睛会变得更好。
accept: Our fingers will get longer and our eyes better.

data.en: It's possible that people will have four toes, not five.
data.cn: 人们可能有四只脚趾，而不是五只。
accept: People will have four toes, not five, it's possible.

data.en: The little toe really isn't needed any more.
data.cn: 小脚趾真的不再需要了。
accept: The little toe really isn't needed anymore.

data.en: People won't have as much hair on their bodies.
data.cn: 人们身体上的毛发不会像现在这么多了。
accept: People won't have as much hair on their bodies.

data.en: My stomach really isn't too good this morning.
data.cn: 我今天早上的胃真的不太舒服。
accept: This morning my stomach really isn't too good.

data.en: Don't eat so quickly you'll bite your tongue.
data.cn: 别吃那么快，你会咬到舌头的。
accept: You'll bite your tongue, don't eat so quickly.

data.en: I fell over while I was skateboarding the other day.
data.cn: 前几天我玩滑板时摔倒了。
accept: The other day I fell over while I was skateboarding.

data.en: I fell on my arm really.
data.cn: 我其实是摔到了手臂上。
accept: I really fell on my arm.

data.en: I just got up and went back to skateboarding.
data.cn: 我直接爬起来继续玩滑板了。
accept: I just got up and went back to skateboarding.

data.en: But now my shoulder hurts.
data.cn: 但现在我的肩膀很痛。
accept: My shoulder hurts now but.

data.en: I can't move it very well.
data.cn: 我没法很好地活动它。
accept: I cannot move it very well.

data.en: I think I've got a problem with my ankle.
data.cn: 我觉得我的脚踝出问题了。
accept: I think I have got a problem with my ankle.

data.en: It just started hurting, I don't know why.
data.cn: 它就开始痛了，我不知道为什么。
accept: I don't know why, it just started hurting.

data.en: Sometimes it's OK but sometimes it hurts a bit.
data.cn: 有时还好，但有时有点痛。
accept: Sometimes it hurts a bit but sometimes it's OK.

data.en: I'm sure I won't get the answers right!
data.cn: 我肯定答不对！
accept: I am sure I won't get the answers right!

data.en: Don't worry, you'll be fine!
data.cn: 别担心，你会没事的！
accept: Don't worry, you will be fine!

data.en: You got a good result in your last test.
data.cn: 你上次考试成绩很好。
accept: In your last test you got a good result.

data.en: Maybe I won't go to school tomorrow.
data.cn: 也许我明天不去上学了。
accept: Tomorrow maybe I won't go to school.

data.en: I'll stay in bed all day.
data.cn: 我会整天待在床上。
accept: I will stay in bed all day.

data.en: That won't help you.
data.cn: 那对你没帮助。
accept: That will not help you.

data.en: The teacher will give you the test on Wednesday.
data.cn: 老师会在周三给你考试。
accept: On Wednesday the teacher will give you the test.

data.en: Why don't I come round to your place this afternoon?
data.cn: 我今天下午去你家怎么样？
accept: This afternoon why don't I come round to your place?

data.en: We can do some French together.
data.cn: 我们可以一起学点法语。
accept: Together we can do some French.

data.en: You'll see that it's not so difficult.
data.cn: 你会发现它没那么难。
accept: You will see that it is not so difficult.

data.en: What can I do for you?
data.cn: 我能为你做点什么？
accept: What can I do for you?

data.en: Does it hurt when I touch it?
data.cn: 我碰它的时候疼吗？
accept: When I touch it does it hurt?

data.en: Let's have a look at it.
data.cn: 让我们检查一下。
accept: Let's have a look at it.

data.en: Can you take your shirt off for me please?
data.cn: 请你把衬衫脱掉好吗？
accept: Please can you take your shirt off for me?

data.en: I'll phone and see if we can go this afternoon.
data.cn: 我会打电话看看我们今天下午能不能去。
accept: I will phone and see if we can go this afternoon.

data.en: Perhaps you should see the doctor.
data.cn: 也许你应该去看医生。
accept: You should see the doctor perhaps.

data.en: What's the matter with your back?
data.cn: 你的背怎么了？
accept: What is the matter with your back?

data.en: I woke up this morning and felt a pain in my back.
data.cn: 我今天早上醒来，感觉背部有点痛。
accept: This morning I woke up and felt a pain in my back.

data.en: Now I've got backache.
data.cn: 现在我有背痛。
accept: Now I have got backache.

data.en: Did you tell your mum and dad?
data.cn: 你告诉你爸妈了吗？
accept: Did you tell your dad and mum?

data.en: I didn't think about it much.
data.cn: 我没想那么多。
accept: I did not think about it much.

data.en: I'll carry your school bag.
data.cn: 我会帮你背书包。
accept: I will carry your school bag.

data.en: When we get to school, I'll take you to see the nurse.
data.cn: 当我们到学校时，我会带你去看校医。
accept: I will take you to see the nurse when we get to school.

data.en: You should do regular exercise to make sure your muscles are strong.
data.cn: 你应该定期锻炼，确保你的肌肉强壮。
accept: To make sure your muscles are strong you should do regular exercise.

data.en: It's a good idea to do a lot of simple exercise.
data.cn: 做大量简单的运动是个好主意。
accept: To do a lot of simple exercise is a good idea.

data.en: You don't have to do sport to be healthy.
data.cn: 为了健康，你不必非得做运动。
accept: To be healthy you don't have to do sport.

data.en: I don't like telling other people about it.
data.cn: 我不喜欢把这件事告诉别人。
accept: I don't like telling about it to other people.

data.en: It's important to go to the doctor if you often have the same problem.
data.cn: 如果你经常有同样的问题，去看医生很重要。
accept: If you often have the same problem it's important to go to the doctor.

data.en: I don't want other people to worry about me.
data.cn: 我不希望别人为我担心。
accept: I do not want other people to worry about me.

data.en: It's OK to get help from people around you.
data.cn: 向周围的人寻求帮助是可以的。
accept: To get help from people around you is OK.
